creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I created a audio/linux-f10-flac port to provide libFLAC and libFLAC++
for use with linux programs that require it. I've been using it to play
Dwarf Fortress on FreeBSD-CURRENT with working sound.

The flac RPM contains a flac executable, but that isn't installed at the
moment as I don't expect that it'd be of any use. The Makefile is based
of off the linux-f10-libogg makefile and it thus sets MAINTAINER to emulation@. I'm happy to maintain the package myself if needed.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
